ddls:
CREATE TABLE "majors" (
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major */,
  "major_name" TEXT /* Name of the major */,
  "major_category" INTEGER /* Category to which the major belongs */,
  "degree_level" TEXT /* Level of the degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration in years to complete the major */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the major */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("major_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_majors_major_category FOREIGN KEY ("major_category") REFERENCES major_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "major_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each major category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the major category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the major category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of employment statistics */,
  "major_code" INTEGER /* Reference to the major for these statistics */,
  "grad_total" INTEGER /* Total number of graduates */,
  "grad_sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size for graduates */,
  "grad_employed" INTEGER /* Number of employed graduates */,
  "grad_full_time_year_round" INTEGER /* Number of graduates employed full-time year-round */,
  "grad_unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed graduates */,
  "grad_unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate among graduates */,
  "grad_median" INTEGER /* Median salary for graduates */,
  "grad_P25" INTEGER /* 25th percentile salary for graduates */,
  "grad_P75" INTEGER /* 75th percentile salary for graduates */,
  "nongrad_total" INTEGER /* Total number of non-graduates */,
  "nongrad_employed" INTEGER /* Number of employed non-graduates */,
  "nongrad_full_time_year_round" INTEGER /* Number of non-graduates employed full-time year-round */,
  "nongrad_unemployed" INTEGER /* Number of unemployed non-graduates */,
  "nongrad_unemployment_rate" INTEGER /* Unemployment rate among non-graduates */,
  "nongrad_median" REAL /* Median salary for non-graduates */,
  "nongrad_P25" INTEGER /* 25th percentile salary for non-graduates */,
  "nongrad_P75" INTEGER /* 75th percentile salary for non-graduates */,
  "grad_share" INTEGER /* Proportion of graduates in the workforce */,
  "grad_premium" REAL /* Salary premium for graduates over non-graduates */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location where the employment statistics are applicable */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the employment statistics pertain */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the employment data */,
  "data_reliability" REAL /* Reliability score of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_statistics_major_code FOREIGN KEY ("major_code") REFERENCES majors ("major_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, researcher, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment statistics being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the statistics */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the statistics were accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES employment_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment statistics used for the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the report was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES employment_statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "filters" (
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each filter */,
  "filter_name" TEXT /* Name of the filter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the filter's purpose */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of filter (e.g., categorical, numerical) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value for the filter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("filter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_filters" (
  "report_filter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association between a report and a filter */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "filter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the filter applied to the report */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value applied to the filter for the specific report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_filters_filter_id FOREIGN KEY ("filter_id") REFERENCES filters ("filter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_filters_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employment statistics */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the updates made */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the data version */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the data version (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES employment_statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
